title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. It supports multiple design modes including Prototype, Slide Deck, and Templates, and can export functional code for responsive landing pages.
